questionHtml:
Infrared (IR) spectroscopy is used to identify functional groups in organic compounds.

Deduce the wavenumber, in cm−1, of an absorption peak found in the IR spectrum of testosterone but not in that of cholesterol.
markschemeHtml:
1700−1750 «cm−1» ✔
NOTE: Accept a specific wavenumber value within range.

meta.title: Infrared (IR) spectroscopy is used to identify functional groups in organic compounds. Deduce the wavenumber, in cm−1, of an absorption peak found in the IR spectrum of testosteron
breadcrumbLabels: D.9 Drug detection and analysis (HL only)
